page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u2i family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, resulting in 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor. It does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 5 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance is classified as memory-optimized. This resource density makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity relative to compute power, without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is suitable for memory-intensive workloads such as caching layers, small to medium databases, and in-memory data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.7 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 8 vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM. This configuration delivers a high memory-to-CPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps. Given its high memory density and dedicated CPU allocation, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as in-memory databases, caching systems, and data processing tasks that require significant RAM without excessive compute overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, running on the KVM hypervisor.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.2xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 5 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring eight dedicated Intel Xeon cores and sixty-four gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: Eight dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores with one thread per core
Sixty-four gigabytes of RAM providing an eight-to-one memory-to-vCPU ratio
Five gigabits per second baseline network bandwidth
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with no local storage or bundled GPUs
Designed for memory-intensive workloads like caching and in-memory databases
